\resumesection{PROJECTS}

\projectentry{TS-ToolKit}{JavaScript, Spring Boot, Google App Engine, Cloud Functions}{https://about.google/}{Project}
  \item Developed \textbf{TextMySnap} to capture and translate error messages, including screenshots, improving accessibility for global users.
  \item Implemented an \textbf{IAM analysis} module to map roles to permissions, enabling better access control and security compliance.
  \item Built responsive frontend interfaces with a focus on usability and cross-platform compatibility.
  \item Deployed on \textbf{Google App Engine} with a serverless backend powered by \textbf{Cloud Functions}.
  \item Followed object-oriented design principles and reusable component architecture for maintainability and scalability.
\projectentryend

\projectentry{HealthMitra}{JavaScript, SQL, Machine Learning, API, XML, HTML5, CSS3}{https://about.google/}{Project}
  \item Designed and built \textbf{HealthMitra}, a scalable web application using \textbf{JavaScript}, \textbf{HTML5}, \textbf{CSS3}, and \textbf{SQL}, with a modular architecture that supports future feature expansion.
  \item Integrated external \textbf{APIs} to collect patient symptom data and process structured inputs for downstream analysis.
  \item Applied \textbf{machine learning} models to analyze symptom data and predict likely health conditions, improving the application's decision-support capability.
\projectentryend
